app.title: {star}{name} – PL/I File Checker & IDE
header.intro: PL/I editor. Choose a file to edit, check and compile.
editor.title: Editor
output.title: Output / Results
msg.encoding_hint: Note: file was read as {encoding} and will be saved as such.
check.none: Great! No obvious errors were found.
check.unclosed_bracket: Line {line}, column {col}: Bracket '{char}' was never closed.
compile.not_found: Error: '{exe}' was not found. Check the path under Settings -> Configure paths.
compile.lib_not_found: Error: 'libprf.a' not found in '{dir}'. Please select the Iron Spring 'lib' folder under Settings -> Configure paths (usually the 'lib' folder next to 'plic').
run.captured_no_input: Note: input (e.g. GET) is not possible in this mode — use the external terminal for that.
run.no_terminal: Error: no supported terminal (gnome-terminal, xterm, konsole) found.
run.unknown_os: Unknown operating system: {system}. Running invisibly in the background...
run.in_separate_window: The program is now running in a separate terminal window.
run.can_input: You can provide input there (e.g. for GET DATA).
run.exit_label: --- Program finished. Press ENTER to close this window ---
paths.title: Configure paths
paths.tab_invalid: Tab width must be a number between 1 and 16.
search.title: Find & Replace
ai.insert_code: Insert code from answer into editor
ai.template_debug: Analyze the PL/I code and the error messages below. Explain the cause(s) and suggest concrete fixes.
ai.template_generate: Generate a complete PL/I program (Iron Spring dialect) that: <describe here what the program should do>
ai.system_prompt: You are an expert in the PL/I programming language (Iron Spring plic compiler on Linux, linked with gcc -m32). Help with debugging and generating PL/I code. Reply in English. Always put code in Markdown code blocks (```pli ... ```) and keep explanations concise.
ai.settings_info:
Ollama needs no API key (local). For 'openai', other OpenAI-compatible servers (Groq, Mistral, LM Studio, ...) work too via the base URL.
Warning: the API key is stored unencrypted in the configuration file.
ai.no_key: No API key configured (menu AI -> Configure AI...).
ai.ollama_hint:
{error}

Hint: Is Ollama running? Start it with 'ollama serve', load the model with 'ollama pull {model}'.
ai.unknown_provider: Unknown AI provider: '{provider}' (allowed: ollama, anthropic, openai)
ai.invalid_json: Response from {url} is not valid JSON: {error}
confirm.unsaved:
The current file has unsaved changes.
Save now?
